subject: chemistry
title: 18M.3.HL.TZ1.8
question_html:
Polymers of glucose include starch and cellulose.

Outline why cellulose fibres are strong.
solution_html:
Any two of:

long straight/unbranched chains

multiple hydrogen bonds «between chains»

 

microfibrils

OR

rigid/cable structure

 

[2 marks]
